rationale.fidelity: Accurately rejects nearest-store search and retains the focal-store assortment, capacity, within-store Markov path, exit outcome, and expected-revenue objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the pre-demand actor, capacity opportunity cost, redirected-demand mechanism, stakes, and alternative feasible assortment concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature contribution is requested or asserted; the response stays within diagnostic and model-framing claims.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly marks within-store substitution as an assumption, competitor destination as unsupported, and matrix validation as unresolved.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and easy to navigate, though slightly longer and more procedural than necessary.
rationale.overall: Excellent diagnosis and reconstruction with no mechanism leakage or hard failure; only a minor economy deduction.
